title: Pumpking Attack Indicator
description: A custom made attack indicator that turns red when full charged and in reach of player. More noticeable than the vanilla attack indicator, great for pvp.
body:
# Pumpking Attack Indicator
Pumpking Attack Indicator is a resource pack that changes the appearance of the attack indicator to make combat timing clearer and more reliable.
## Features
- Slightly modifies the sword attack indicator
- Turns the indicator red when the target is in range and the attack is fully charged
- Improves visibility of attack cooldown timing
- Helps bypass vanilla attack indicator issues caused by certain crosshair mods
## **Why use this pack?**
The vanilla attack indicator can be hard to read or even broken when used alongside custom crosshair mods. This pack makes the indicator clearer and more readable, allowing players to time their hits more accurately and avoid visual bugs that render the default indicator unreliable.
## Important
> For Minecraft versions after 1.21.1, this resource pack requires the Crosshair Tweaks mod to function correctly. The mod helps prevent attack indicator blending and restores proper colors. Make sure to turn on, "Remove Attack Indicator Blending First Person", in the mod!
